---
title: Messages
description: A messaging template. A scrolling message thread with ChatBubble, plus ComposeFlow quick replies for the no-keyboard text answer, on one glanceable screen.
---

A chat screen: a scrolling thread of [ChatBubble](/docs/blocks/chat-bubble)
messages, with [ComposeFlow](/docs/components/compose-flow) for the reply. Since
the lens has no keyboard, activating the field opens a back-gesture-aware picker
of quick replies; pick one and it composes back into the thread.

<ExampleDoc slug="messages" />
